title: CBI Impersonation — Arrest Warrant Threat
description: Spoofed call claiming CBI arrest warrant. Victim asked to transfer ₹2L 'bail amount' and stay on line. Scam score: 94/100. Isolation + impersonation tactics confirmed.

title: Counterfeit ₹500 Note Detected
description: Mobile scan flagged missing Mahatma Gandhi watermark and incorrect security thread on ₹500 note. Denomination confirmed by color analysis.

title: Mule Ring Linkage — 4 Accounts
description: New UPI account shares device fingerprint with 4 flagged mule accounts. Fan-in pattern and sub-threshold structuring detected in transaction graph.

title: KYC Expiry Robocall Blocked
description: Automated IVR scam claiming bank KYC expired — 'press 1 to avoid account freeze'. Blocked at pattern-match stage before victim interaction.

title: Merchant KYC Verification Passed
description: Routine KYC check passed for new registered street-food merchant. No fraud graph linkage. Low-risk baseline confirmed.

title: Counterfeit ₹2000 Ring — 3 Merchants
description: Three merchants in the same bazaar reported high-quality fake ₹2000 notes within 90 minutes. Notes lack colour-shifting numeral and latent image. Coordinated distribution suspected.

title: Money Mule Activity — Structuring Pattern
description: Rapid succession of ₹49,500 transfers to a single receiver account — just under ₹50,000 reporting threshold. Fan-in from 8 senders within 2 hours flagged as classic smurfing.

title: AnyDesk Tech-Support Scam
description: Caller claiming to be Microsoft Support requested AnyDesk installation to 'fix virus'. Remote-access request pattern detected. Victim warned before app install.
